pr.title: PR #142 â€” Execution Report Framework v1
pr.description:
## Summary

Adds the **execution-report** layer on top of the Execution Artifact Framework (#141), completing the deterministic execution roadmap: `â€¦ â†’ Artifact â†’ Report`. Where prior layers track discrete execution facts, this layer produces *structured, human- and machine-readable reports that summarize execution outcomes, artifacts, failures, and evidence*. Clean **v1** â€” no prior `execution_report` module/CLI exists.

New twist vs prior layers: reports carry **ordered sections** (sub-records) in addition to typed references, and the engine's container is an `ExecutionReportSummary` (aggregating many `ExecutionReport`s) rather than `â€¦Report`.

Observational/declarative only: consumes ExecutionResult + ExecutionArtifact + ExecutionAttempt v2 + CapabilityKnowledgeGraph **read-only**. Per non-goals it does **not** execute, orchestrate, schedule, publish reports, build dashboards, assign workers, or make network calls. Revit 2024 baseline unaffected.

New module `src/axiom_core/execution_report.py` (`ExecutionReport` / `ExecutionReportSection` / `ExecutionReportReference` / `ExecutionReportSummary` / `ExecutionReportEvidence` / `ExecutionReportEngine`):

- **Report**: `report_id, capability_id, attempt_id, result_id, report_type, status, sections, references, summary, created_at, schema_version, raw_payload`
- **Report types**: `EXECUTION_SUMMARY / VALIDATION_SUMMARY / FAILURE_SUMMARY / ARTIFACT_SUMMARY / REVIEW_SUMMARY / FINAL_SUMMARY / OTHER`
- **Statuses**: `CREATED / COMPLETE / PARTIAL / FAILED / UNKNOWN`
- **Section**: `section_id, section_type, title, content, order_index`; section types `OVERVIEW / RESULT / ARTIFACTS / FAILURES / VALIDATION / RISKS / NEXT_STEPS / OTHER`
- **Reference types**: `RESULT / ARTIFACT / ATTEMPT / CAPABILITY / FILE / VALIDATION / KNOWLEDGE_NODE / OTHER`
- **Summary**: `report_count, section_count, status_counts, report_type_counts, failed_count, partial_count, complete_count, duplicate_report_count`

Deterministic ordering, dedup, section ordering, and pass/fail gate:

```
report sort key  = (capability_id, attempt_id, result_id, report_type, status, report_id)
section sort key = (order_index, section_type, title, section_id)
dedup key        = (capability_id, attempt_id, result_id, report_type)  # keep first in sorted order, count surplus
passed           = report_count > 0 and failed_count == 0   # empty summary -> fail
```

CLI (4 commands, JSON/Markdown/CSV exports), registered in `command_registry.py`:

```
axiom execution-report-create [--report-file <rf>] [--json-output]
axiom execution-reports [--json-output]
axiom execution-report-show <summary_id> [--json-output]
axiom execution-report-export <summary_id> [--format markdown|json|csv]
```

Evidence bundle always written under `artifacts/execution_report/<run_id>/` (5 files: `execution_report_request.json`, `execution_report_result.json`, `execution_report_summary.md`, `pass_fail.json`, `report.json`); directory git-ignored.

## Validation

- **New tests:** +61 (`tests/test_execution_report.py`) + `test_command_registry.py`/`test_selection_engine` updates
- **Full pytest:** `poetry run pytest -q` â†’ **4978 passed, 1 skipped** (baseline 4917 at #141)
- **Ruff:** `poetry run ruff check src/ tests/` â†’ 0 errors
- **CLI smoke (shell-authoritative):** adversarial fixture (5 reports â†’ 1 case-insensitive duplicate `(cap-1,att-1,res-1,EXECUTION_SUMMARY)`, 1 FAILED, 1 PARTIAL, lowercase types/statuses, out-of-order sections) â†’ report_count 4 / section_count 4 / failed 1 / partial 1 / complete 2 / duplicate 1; status `{COMPLETE:2,FAILED:1,PARTIAL:1}`; deterministic report order; sections ordered by order_index 0â†’1â†’2; show round-trips identically; markdown/CSV(header+4 reports+4 sections+2 refs=11 rows)/JSON exports valid; error paths show-missing exit 2, traversal exit 1, invalid report_type exit 1; pass_fail `false` adversarial, `true` clean, `false` empty

## What did NOT change

- No modification to ExecutionArtifact (#141) or any prior layer
- No execution / orchestration / scheduling / report publishing / dashboard / worker assignment / network calls / architecture changes
- Revit 2024 baseline unaffected


Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8ad1c9ac0d2f4252bb77647f1eabaac7
Requested by: @plamen-dev
